questionHtml: Find a minimum spanning tree for the subgraph obtained by deleting A from G.
markschemeHtml:
Start (for instance) at B, using Prim′s algorithm Then D is the nearest vertex      M1

Next E is the nearest vertex       A1

Finally C is the nearest vertex So a minimum spanning tree is B → D → E → C           A1  N1

[3 marks]

meta.title: Find a minimum spanning tree for the subgraph obtained by deleting A from G.
